opportunities.title: Funnel event observability + startup_events capture
opportunities.problem: Entire user-side funnel is blind: ai_logs.by_operation={}, growth_event_count=1, startup_events=0 rows, matches 0 viewed/intro/contacted. Two 'shipped' P0 instrumentation items emit zero events and we cannot tell no-traffic from no-logging.
opportunities.hypothesis: Funnel is under-instrumented, not un-trafficked. A synthetic probe + funnel heartbeat + preview_requested write disambiguates in 48h and seeds match inventory.
opportunities.next_step: Run synthetic probe through /matches?url=, /api/matches/engage, investor signup; add funnel block to product-metrics-snapshot.mjs; wire preview_requested to startup_events. Spec: agents/product/specs/founder_supply_seeding.md

opportunities.title: Match engagement API + UI events
opportunities.problem: 3.7M matches exist but viewed/intro/contact events are not wired — we cannot optimize post-signup funnel.
opportunities.hypothesis: Instrumenting view → intro → contact will reveal where founders drop off and unlock engagement experiments.
opportunities.target: 5% intro rate on viewed matches within 30d of launch
opportunities.next_step: BLIND: 0 viewed/intro/contacted of 3.73M matches. Marked shipped but emitting zero events — verify via founder_supply_seeding probe before trusting.

opportunities.title: Founder match nudge service
opportunities.problem: Founders submit URL but may not return to view matches.
opportunities.hypothesis: Email/in-app nudge with top 3 investor names increases return visits 2x.
opportunities.next_step: Spec email template + Resend trigger after first match batch

opportunities.title: Weekly investor dealflow digest (MCP + email)
opportunities.problem: Investors lack a reason to log in after signup.
opportunities.hypothesis: Thesis-matched startup digest increases investor retention and intro acceptance.
opportunities.next_step: Design digest schema: top 5 startups by thesis fit + deployment velocity signal

opportunities.title: Preview matches before signup (matches_preview variant)
opportunities.problem: Founders may bounce before seeing value.
opportunities.hypothesis: Showing 3 blurred matches before account creation increases signup completion.
opportunities.next_step: BLIND: growth_event_count=1 in 7d — cannot compare variants. Gated behind founder_supply_seeding observability fix before any traffic-reallocation decision.

opportunities.title: Reject junk names at ingest
opportunities.problem: Low-quality startup names pollute match pool and depress GOD means.
opportunities.hypothesis: Entity-resolution gate at submit reduces C-tier approved startups by 30%.
opportunities.next_step: Run npm run pipeline:god-audit; tighten correlate-policy thresholds

opportunities.title: Why this investor? — match explain API
opportunities.problem: Founders see scores but not reasoning; investors distrust black-box ranking.
opportunities.hypothesis: Structured explain blocks (portfolio fit, stage, check size, recency) increase intro requests.
opportunities.next_step: Extend get_match_insights MCP tool with copy-ready explain blocks
